ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_cards" (
  "network_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network card */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the network card */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the network card */,
  "interface_type" TEXT /* Type of interface (e.g., Ethernet, Wi-Fi) */,
  "pci_slot" TEXT /* PCI slot type (e.g., PCI Express x1, PCI Express x4) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the network card */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the network card */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility information of the network card */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the network card */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the network card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_cards_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_cards_interface_type FOREIGN KEY ("interface_type") REFERENCES interface_types ("interface_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_cards_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_cards_pci_slot FOREIGN KEY ("pci_slot") REFERENCES pci_slots ("pci_slot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the model */,
  "series" TEXT /* Series of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interface_types" (
  "interface_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interface type */,
  "interface_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interface type (e.g., Ethernet, Wi-Fi) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interface type */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Speed of the interface type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interface_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pci_slots" (
  "pci_slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PCI slot */,
  "slot_name" TEXT /* Name of the PCI slot (e.g., PCI Express x1, PCI Express x4) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the PCI slot */,
  "bandwidth" TEXT /* Bandwidth of the PCI slot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pci_slot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "network_card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network card */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the network card */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the price is effective */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount available for the network card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_network_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_card_id") REFERENCES network_cards ("network_card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., sales representative, procurement officer) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_levels" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "network_card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network card */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the network card in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory level was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level of the network card */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity of the network card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_levels_network_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_card_id") REFERENCES network_cards ("network_card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who placed the order */,
  "network_card_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network card ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the network card ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_network_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_card_id") REFERENCES network_cards ("network_card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
